resources.string: Ready for voice transcription from the watch. This notification is a requirement from the Android OS. Feel free to disable it.
Error: Press \'Enable voice\' in the phone app in Tools
Error: sorry, voice recognition is only supported on Android 13+
Error: Phone does not have a voice recognition service installed
Error: No voice input app set as default on phone. Check phone notifications.
No voice input service is set as default. Tap to configure.
